---
title: Glossary
description: Key terms used throughout this style guide
---

## A

- **Active voice:** A sentence structure where the subject performs the action.

## C

- **Content type:** A category of documentation, such as how-to guide, reference, or explanation.

## S

- **Sentence case:** Capitalization style where only the first word and proper nouns are capitalized.
- **Style guide:** A set of standards for writing and formatting documentation.
